page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.m1.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance belonging to the ecs.m1 server family. It is built on the x86_64 CPU architecture and runs on the KVM hypervisor. The instance features 8 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, providing a total of 8 vCPUs. It is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include bundled local storage, requiring network-attached storage for persistent data. It does not feature any GPU hardware accelerators or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The CPU flags indicate a lack of advanced instruction sets such as AVX, AVX512, AMX, or hardware-accelerated cryptography extensions like AES-NI.

With its dedicated CPU allocation and 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the ecs.m1.xlarge is designed for standard general-purpose workloads. It is suitable for applications requiring consistent CPU performance without hyperthreading, such as mid-range web servers, application backends, and development environments. The absence of local storage and advanced vector extensions makes it less suitable for high-performance computing, heavy database operations, or machine learning tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.m1.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance from the ecs.m1 family, running on the KVM hypervisor with an x86_64 architecture. It provides 8 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, delivering 8 vCPUs alongside 32.0 GB of system memory. This configuration maintains a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio of 4.0 GB per core. The instance does not include local storage, GPU accelerators, or complimentary public IPv4 addresses, and lacks advanced CPU instruction sets like AVX or AES-NI. Given its dedicated resource allocation and standard hardware profile, the ecs.m1.xlarge is best suited for general-purpose workloads, including mid-tier web serving, application hosting, and development environments that require predictable CPU performance without the need for specialized hardware acceleration or local high-speed storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.m1.xlarge is a general-purpose KVM-based instance featuring 8 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs, 32.0 GB of RAM, and no local storage, designed for standard application hosting.
